creator: ml@netfence.it
text:
(In reply to Siva Mahadevan from comment #1)

Uh!
It's 4.5 years since I opened this bug report... I guess a lot has changed.
I don't recall having seen this strange behaviour in a long time.
Probably it was already fixed?
Perhaps the best thing to do is close this bug and I'll reopen it if I ever see this again?
